plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to eliminate that risk.
Trim SPY from 30% to 20% to reduce broad index concentration.
Increase QQQI to 20% to boost income generation.
Trim CRWD from 13% to 10% to lower single stock concentration.
Buy ALAB at 10% as a strong, high-quality addition.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with a significant cash buffer.
conservative.read: This plan aims for capital preservation with a target of around 1.5% per month. It significantly reduces leverage and concentration risk, focusing on stability over aggressive growth.

moves.note: Add quality setup with tight stop.

plan: Trim SOXL to 3% to reduce leveraged ETF risk.
Trim SPY to 25% to address concentration.
Increase QQQI to 15% to add income.
Slightly increase CRWD to 12% for quality tech exposure.
Buy ALAB at 10% for its strong scanner read.
Buy ANET at 5% as a quality addition with a tight stop.
balanced.read: This plan targets around 2.5% per month by balancing growth and risk. It trims leverage and concentration while adding quality names and income, aiming for steady growth with controlled drawdowns.

plan: Increase SOXL to 10% to leverage strong semiconductor trends.
Trim SPY to 20% to reduce broad index exposure.
Increase CRWD to 15% to concentrate on a high-conviction name.
Add ALAB at 15% as the top scanner setup.
Add CRDO at 10% to capture its strong risk/reward.
Add ZS at 10% to further build on quality tech.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets around 4% per month, accepting significantly higher potential drawdowns. It leans into leveraged ETFs and concentrated high-scoring setups, with a smaller cash buffer and the risk of amplified losses due to leverage and daily rebalancing of leveraged products.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) to remove volatility.
Sell CRWD to cut high-beta single stock exposure.
Trim SPY to 20% to free capital for income.
Significantly increase QQQI to 40% for maximum income generation.
Buy GLD at 10% for diversification and stability.
This plan prioritizes steady monthly distributions over growth.
income.read: This income-focused plan targets around 1% per month, prioritizing capital preservation and reliable distributions. It cuts leverage and growth stocks, focusing heavily on income-generating assets like QQQI, with a conservative approach to minimize drawdowns.
